description: Create new scrip supply backed by an x402 USDC payment. Only the exchange operator (campfire key holder) can mint. The x402_tx_ref must reference a valid, unspent x402 payment. Amount must equal x402_usd_amount * rate (within 1 micro-token rounding). Each x402_tx_ref can only be used once (prevents double-mint). State effect: recipient balance increases by amount, total supply increases by amount.

args.name: recipient
args.description: Ed25519 public key (hex) of the scrip recipient.

args.name: amount
args.description: Scrip amount in micro-tokens (1 token = 1,000,000 micro-tokens).

args.name: x402_tx_ref
args.description: x402 transaction reference (USDC payment proof). Must be a valid, unspent payment.

args.name: rate
args.description: Conversion rate used: micro-tokens per USDC cent.
